title: FUTR (Quantitive trading)
author: KlutzyForce1449
selftext:
FUTR (Quantitive trading app)

Hello everyone, I’m sharing with you, a great way to make passive income, this is Quantitive trading.

1: deposit funds through a crypto exchange 

2: make sure to press your button to complete Quantitive trading!

3: generate profits!

4: all funds are withdrawable to your crypto wallet!

Quantitive trading is when a robot trades crypto for you; it will buy a crypto currency on one exchange for a set price, then resell it on another; once the platform has taken its commission from the trade you are rewarded with the profit!

It is also beneficial to invite your friends to use the Quantitive trading platform, as by doing so you can earn commission rewards for every completed trade they make! Just for inviting them into the platform.

I will attach a YouTube video showcasing the app. https://youtu.be/oxEXZ-F_b0c?si=3Bg5VIvCRAxgmFjk

Signup link :  https://app.futrop.com/reg/account?inviteCode=U6US0IY3
